Narrative Layer

Team insights

These summaries are intended to stay grounded in the offline ML pipeline: they are generated ahead of time from Elo, form, and squad-strength signals and cached in Supabase.

Brazil

CONMEBOL

BRA

Brazil brings strong recent-form signals, credible squad quality, and enough attacking talent to stay dangerous across knockout-state game scripts.

HF model: demo
